name: ai-native-game-design
description: Design and review runtime AI gameplay and AI NPC systems with source-aware methods.

interface.shortDescription: Design and review runtime AI gameplay
interface.longDescription: Source-aware workflows for player-AI interfaces, runtime generation, AI companions and societies, layered memory, open narrative, adjudication, continuity, failure recovery, safety, prototypes, playtests, and AI-native design reviews.
defaultPrompt: Design a bounded player-AI interaction loop
Design an AI companion memory policy
Plan tests for a multi-agent NPC society
